description: Send notifications to your own IFTTT destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise ifttt:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead POST a native IFTTT Webhooks payload directly to maker.ifttt.com, bypassing Apprise.
name: msg-to-ifttt

request.template: {"urls":"ifttt://${ customer_secrets.IFTTT_WEBHOOK_ID }/${ customer_secrets.IFTTT_EVENTS }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"ifttt://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.events_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

gateway-plus.base_url: ${ customer_secrets.IFTTT_WEBHOOK_BASE ?? https://maker.ifttt.com }/trigger/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.event_secret }} }/with/key/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_id_secret }} }
